meaning: n.兴谷河(巴西中北部一河流)
examples: This astronaut photograph illustrates slash-and-burn forest clearing along the Rio Xingu (Xingu River) in the state of Matto Grasso, Brazil.
The dam calls for diversion of up to 100 kilometers of the Xingu, an Amazon River tributary.
The dam is to be built on the Xingu River in the heart of the Amazon rainforest.
Belo Monte is to be built on the Xingu River in the Amazon, home to virgin rainforest and around 2, 500 natives.
